title: Exam 5
text:
Overview
These notes are to prepare for Exam 5, which covers basic techniques for ratemaking and estimating claim liabilities.








Quarto blog publish details



This book was created using Quarto and published with Github Pages.








Github repository for code



You can find the code to reproduce this project at coltongearhart/mas1.

title: Ratemaking
text: This section contains notes for Part A of the syllabus: Ratemaking.

title: Estimating claim liabilities
text: This section contains notes for Part B of the syllabus: Estimating claim liabilities.
